rationale: Bug hunt C23 found BUG-031 (MEDIUM): _calculate_player_maturity() called 16x/frame (2 per icon × 8 icons) in biome_radial.gd _draw() — cached once per draw cycle. Main feature: wired BiomeRadial into _on_partir_pressed() — was hardcoded foret_broceliande bypass since C0, now opens 8-biome radial with maturity gating. Created OghamEquipPanel (242 lines) for pre-run Ogham selection — CRT-styled card grid showing unlocked oghams with category-colored borders (cyan=reveal, green=protection, amber=boost, etc.), unicode ogham glyphs, cooldown display. Flow: PARTIR → BiomeRadial (choose biome) → OghamEquipPanel (choose ogham) → launch. If only 1 ogham unlocked, auto-equips and skips panel. Bible s.2.2 compliance: player equips 1 Ogham at start of each run.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C24: verify OghamEquipPanel signal lifecycle (panel_dismissed vs ogham_selected — no double-fire), test _layout_cards with 1 ogham vs 6+ oghams (row overflow), verify BiomeRadial center position relative to PARTIR button on mobile viewport. Feature: wire selected ogham into WalkHUD display (show equipped ogham name + cooldown on 3D walk scene). Currently the HUD shows no ogham info during run.
